cms.task_text: Naprogramujte želvu, aby nakreslila [hlp]kříž[/hlp]. Vodorovná čára je [hlp]tloušťky 5[/hlp] a je dlouhá 60 pixelů. Pak [hlp]zvedněte pero[/hlp], vraťte se na střed, otočte se doprava, [hlp]spusťte pero[/hlp], nastavte [hlp]tloušťku 1[/hlp] a nakreslete svislou čáru dlouhou 60 pixelů dolů a 60 pixelů nahoru.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_set_pen_width" x="50" y="50"><field name="WIDTH">10</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_set_pen_width"><field name="WIDTH">1</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">120</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_set_pen_width" x="50" y="50"><field name="WIDTH">5</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_set_pen_width"><field name="WIDTH">1</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">120</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
